name: Medical Concepts

steps.name: When the user goes to the home page

When the user goes to the home page

Given the user chooses "UI_edit_medical_concept" in the tm medical record strategy

Given the user chooses "UI_change_medical_concept" in the tm medical record strategy
When the user changes a medical concept state with:
